entry.title: About
entry.content: Hey there! I am a linguist interested in technologies for atypical speech, including disorder speech (mainly dysarthric speech) and L2 speech. My passion comes from making a better world where everyone can convey their messages towards the world.

entry.title: Brief Bio
entry.content:
• PhD candiate in Linguistics @Seoul National University (Spoken Language Processing), 2021.3 - Current
  • MA in Linguistics @Seoul National University(Spoken Language Processing), 2019.3-2021.2
  • BA in Korean Language and Literature, & Psychology @ Yonsei University, 2014.3-2018.2

entry.title: Conferences
entry.content:
Choi, K.*, & Yeo, E. J.* (2022). Opening the Black Box of wav2vec Feature Encoder. arXiv preprint arXiv:2210.15386. [Github]

Yeo, E. J.* , Choi, K.*, Kim, S., & Chung, M. (2022). Automatic Severity Assessment of Dysarthric speech by using Self-supervised Model with Multi-task Learning. arXiv preprint arXiv:2210.15387. [Github]

Yeo, E. J., Kim, S., & Chung, M. (2022). Multilingual analysis of intelligibility classification using English, Korean, and Tamil dysarthric speech datasets. in Proc. O-Cocosda (Oral, Virtual) (Best Student Paper)

Yeo, E. J., Choi, K., Kim, S., & Chung, M. (2022). Cross-lingual Dysarthria Severity Classification for English, Korean, and Tamil. in Proc. APSIPA ASC (Oral only) [Github]

Yeo, E. J., Kim, S., & Chung, M. (2021). Automatic Severity Classification of Korean Dysarthric Speech Using Phoneme-Level Pronunciation Features, in Proc. Interspeech (Poster, Virtual)

Hernandez, A., Yeo, E. J., Kim, S., & Chung, M. (2020, September). Dysarthria Detection and Severity Assessment Using Rhythm-Based Metrics. in Proc. Interspeech (Poster, Virtual)

entry.title: Journals
entry.content: Yeo, E. J., Kim, S., & Chung, M. (2021). Automatic severity classification of dysarthria using voice quality, prosody, and pronunciation features. Phonetics and Speech Sciences, 13(2), 57-66.

entry.title: Awards
entry.content:
2021 인공지능 데이터 기반 서비스 공모전 '너의 A.Idea가 보여', 최우수상 (‘I can see your A.Idea’ AI data-based service contest 2021, the grand prize)

2022 언어 교육용 서양어, 아시아어 사용자의 한국어 음성 데이터 활용 해커톤, 은상 (Analysis on L2 Korean speech data from Western and Asian speakers for language education Hackathon 2022, 2nd Place)

entry.title: Scholarships
entry.content:
• SNU CORE 장학금 (2019.9-2020.2)
  • SNU 기초학문 후속세대 석사과정 (2020.3-2020.12)
  • SNU 기초학문 후속세대 박사과정 (2021.3-2022.12)

entry.title: Projects
entry.content:
• 한국인 학습자의 프랑스어 모음 발화 연구(2019.8-9)
  • 사회적 소통 약자의 접근성을 고려한 지능형 도구 기반 콘텐츠 제작 및 향유 지원 기술 개발 (2019.9-2021.12)
  • 언어교육용 한국인의 외국어 음성 데이터(2022.1-2022.12)
  • 언어교육용 서양어, 아시아어 사용자의 한국어 음성 데이터(2022.1-2022.12)
